title: Silent Failure Audit — Decifer 3.0 First Full Day

what_changed.change: Fixed _exit_price UnboundLocalError — variable was only assigned in the extended-hours else branch but read unconditionally at the thesis-failure gate (line ~1947). Now initialized before the market-hours branch so it is always bound.

Added CLOSE records to execution_ic stream. Only OPEN records were written before, making exit_reason/pnl null on all 8,132 IC entries. IC calculator now receives paired entry+outcome data from this session forward.

Floor rule enforcement: when >=3 candidates score >=35 and Apex returns zero entries, now fires log.error() + FLOOR_RULE_VIOLATION audit event. Previously was a silent log.warning() — rule was prompt-only with no algorithmic enforcement.

Scoring gap circuit breaker: 3+ consecutive scans with scored=0 fires log.error() + SCORING_GAP audit event. The April 27 2-hour silent gap (11 consecutive zero-scored scans) would have been caught immediately.

Sentiment and options runners escalate to log.warning() after 3+ consecutive empty-store skips. One skip is normal startup timing (fundamental screener takes >180s); three or more means the fundamental screener is failing silently.

Fixed 'event loop is already running' crash in execute_sell. _process_article was called synchronously inside the async on_news WebSocket callback (Alpaca's event loop), causing ib.placeOrder/ib.sleep to fail — silently caught, positions left open in IBKR untracked. Now spawned in a daemon thread to give execute_sell a clean non-async context.

decisions_made: Issue #5 (metadata loss -> UNKNOWN forced exits) deferred — fading naturally as pre-migration positions close out. New positions always have metadata.
STP VALIDATIONERROR (80+ events) confirmed as IBKR warning 2109 per memory note — stops are working, orders transition to SUBMITTED within 400ms. No fix needed.
Issue #9 (Monday trades.json = 0): confirmed as pre-market timing. 12 trades logged for 2026-04-28 by 12:25 ET. Bot running normally.

resolved_timing: Monday trades.json = 0 (was pre-market at audit time)

known_flakes: test_positions_persistence.py — reads live DB, fails when bot is running with open positions
test_reconnect.py::test_backoff_capped_sequence_values — passes in isolation, flaky in full suite

what_is_next: Phase C gate still blocked on 200 closed trades — IC data now being captured correctly from this session forward.
No open silent failures remaining from the Monday audit.
Issue #5 (UNKNOWN exits) to revisit if positions keep getting forced-exited after pre-migration positions clear.
commits: 0f35b31 fix(execution): resolve _exit_price UnboundLocalError and add IC CLOSE records
c150e89 fix(apex): enforce floor rule as ERROR + add scoring gap circuit breaker
8cff2e6 fix(catalyst): escalate persistent empty-store skips from INFO to WARNING
69452ab fix(news): run _process_article in a daemon thread to fix event-loop collision
